use_cases: Interactive hero element for landing pages with immersive 3D visuals
Decorative background component for creative portfolios and showcase sites
Visual accent for tech/SaaS product pages requiring cutting-edge aesthetics
Standalone 3D art piece for digital galleries and interactive experiences
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered 3D crystalline cube rendered using ray marching techniques, featuring procedural color palette generation and time-based animation. The component responds dynamically to mouse movement for interactive lighting effects and color shifts. Ideal for creating immersive hero sections, decorative visual elements, or standalone 3D art pieces with modern, futuristic aesthetics.
